steps: Go to https://app.turso.tech and log in or create a free account
Navigate to Settings > API Tokens at https://app.turso.tech/settings/tokens
Click 'Create Token', enter a name for the token
Copy the generated API token — it is shown only once
Alternatively, use the Turso CLI: run 'turso auth token' after logging in with 'turso auth login'

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Token
credential_fields.description: Your Turso platform API token, sent as a Bearer token in the Authorization header

notes: Free Starter plan includes 5 databases, 9 GB storage, and 500M row reads/month
The API token is a JWT — it is shown only once at creation, save it immediately
Separate database-level tokens can be generated per database via /v1/organizations/{org}/databases/{db}/auth/tokens
Organization name (slug) is required as a path parameter in most API endpoints

test_endpoint.description: List all organizations accessible with the API token
